## TRM1.4. Vertical flight efficiency of the descent (PI#7)

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (149.2 seconds per flight), average times flown level during descent are on average 51.7 seconds per flight lower in Ireland. The highest average time flown level during descent happens at Dublin (EIDW) (100.9 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Cork (EICK) (76.5 seconds per flight).
